task_completion.description: Click the + button in the sidebar to create a new tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sidebar's + (new tiddler) button is clicked, and a new tiddler editor opens with 'New Tiddler' in the title field.

task_completion.description: Enter the title 'Machine Learning Pipeline Architecture'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field in the tiddler editor shows 'Machine Learning Pipeline Architecture' or similar ML pipeline title.
Tag pills showing 'Technology' and 'MachineLearning' are visible in the tiddler editor or viewer.

task_completion.description: Write substantial content about ML pipelines with at least 100 words
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler text area contains multiple paragraphs discussing data ingestion, model training, pipelines, and deployment.

task_completion.description: Apply TiddlyWiki formatting (headings, bold, italics, lists)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered tiddler shows formatted headings (! syntax), bold text ('' syntax), italic text (// syntax), or bullet points (* syntax).

task_completion.description: Save the tiddler by clicking the checkmark button
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler is saved and displayed in view mode showing the title, tags, and rendered content.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox, including clicking buttons and typing in fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly edit .tid files via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible editing files in the mywiki/tiddlers/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a tiddler titled 'Machine Learning Pipeline Architecture' with tags 'Technology' and 'MachineLearning', containing 100+ words about ML pipelines with TiddlyWiki formatting.
